seoTitle: Applethorpe vs Araluen — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Applethorpe and Araluen. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Applethorpe and Araluen.
heading: Applethorpe vs Araluen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Applethorpe, Queensland and Araluen, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Applethorpe has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Araluen (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Applethorpe or Araluen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Applethorpe has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Araluen scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Applethorpe scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Araluen scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Applethorpe or Araluen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Applethorpe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
